_comment_target: v4 (ActionRenderSelfCrossAdapterV4) smoke run on n06 (4x H100 NVL 95 GB). 10-video subset for fast plumbing validation. Tests: (1) pre-encoder mean-subtract on VAE latents; (2) temporal-mix middle conv with replicate-padding; (3) 3D positional encoding on render tokens; (4) self-attention transformer blocks over render tokens BEFORE cross-attention; (5) 1D positional encoding on action tokens before cross-attn. With 10 vids x 4 GPUs = ~3 steps/epoch, 5 epochs runs in minutes once cache builds.
_precompute_cache_note: Fresh probe-suffixed cache path so we don't clobber any training cache. ~50 MB once built.
_tracks_note: Live changes inherited from main: TracksHead.mlp[-1] uses Kaiming-He init x 0.1 (model.py:201-208), loss is MSE not smooth_l1 (train_fsdp.py:1419 / train.py:1684), lambda=50 to make track contribution comparable to flow. max_query_points=640 uses ALL sparse AllTracker points per step (not subsampled).
_val_note: Held-out 10-scene eval set (never in training). Val fires at end of epoch 1 (first val) and epoch 3. Cache: probe-suffixed so we don't disturb other runs.
